debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)

proof:
(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)
failed_attempts:
(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · subst h
        simp only [Set.insert_eq_of_mem, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        rw [sSup_pair]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · subst h
        simp only [Set.insert_eq_of_mem, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        rw [sSup_pair]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [Set.insert_eq, sSup_pair]
        exact h.symm
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [Set.insert_eq_of_mem, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        rw [h, sSup_pair]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · subst h
        simp only [Set.insert_eq_of_mem, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        rw [sSup_pair]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(by
      intro N hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [Set.insert_eq_of_mem, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        rw [h]
        simp [sSup_pair]
      · simp [sSup_singleton])
successful_attempts:
(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [sSup_pair, h]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h, sSup_pair]
      · simp)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, sSup_pair]
        exact h
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)
(fun N hN' => by simp only [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [sSup_pair, h]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [sSup_pair, h]
      · simp [sSup_singleton])
(fun N hN' => by simp only [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h, sSup_pair]
      · simp [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)
(fun N hN' => by simp only [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h, sSup_pair]
      · simp [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, sSup_insert, sSup_singleton]
        exact h
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h, sSup_pair]
      · simp [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [h]
      · simp)
(fun N hN' => by simp only [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · subst h
        simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff, sSup_insert, sSup_singleton]
      · simp only [sSup_singleton])

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [h, sSup_pair]
      · simp [sSup_singleton])
